user.title: KONTINUUM Setup
user.description: KONTINUUM learns your home's patterns and predicts what happens next. Choose a personality that determines how fast the system learns and acts.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: KONTINUUM includes a brain visualization dashboard. If enabled, it will be auto-installed and accessible via the sidebar.

general.title: General Settings
general.description: Personality, operation mode, tracking and general options.

data.home_only_mode: Home-Only Mode (pause when nobody is home)

cortex.title: 🧠 Cortex – LLM Agents (optional)
cortex.description:
KONTINUUM learns and decides fully without an LLM. The Cortex is an optional upgrade: up to 4 agents (Comfort, Energy, Safety, Coordinator) deliberate on complex decisions.

Providers: Ollama (local), OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, Grok and Custom/OpenAI-compatible (e.g. OpenCLAW).

data_description.enable_cortex: Off = local learning only. On = LLM agents advise on top.
data_description.sequential_mode: Query agents one-by-one instead of in parallel - recommended for a single GPU/Ollama instance.
data_description.discussion_rounds: How often agents may revise on disagreement (1-3). More rounds = more thorough, but slower.

agents_overview.title: Cortex – Agent Overview
agents_overview.description: Manage your LLM agents (up to 4). Agents are preserved until you explicitly remove them.

data_description.action: Add, edit or remove an agent - or go back to the menu.

agent_setup.title: Cortex – Agent {slot} (Connection)
agent_setup.description: Choose a role and provider. For Ollama just enter the host (e.g. 'localhost' or '192.168.1.100').

data_description.role: Comfort, Energy, Safety, Coordinator - or your own role (Custom).
data_description.provider: Ollama runs locally without a key. Cloud providers need an API key. "Custom/OpenAI-compatible" for your own endpoints like OpenCLAW.
data_description.url: Base URL only (e.g. http://192.168.1.50:8080). "/v1/chat/completions" is appended automatically - do not enter it yourself. Empty = provider default.
data_description.api_key: Only needed for cloud/custom providers. Leave empty for Ollama.

data_description.model: For Ollama a dropdown of installed models. For cloud/custom enter the model name (e.g. gpt-4o-mini or your OpenCLAW model).
data_description.system_prompt: Optional - overrides the default prompt of the chosen role. Empty = default.

error.ollama_unreachable: Cannot reach Ollama at this address. Check if Ollama is running and the URL is correct.
